title: Blocks for Builders
description: A simple mod adding a handful of extra blocks to benefit builders.
body:
## Blocks for Builders

This is a small mod aiming to fit in with Vanilla as seamlessly as possible, adding blocks and content for building-focused players.

------------------------
### Content:
The mod adds the following:

- Ten new wood types
  
  - Willow (pale teal)
 
  - Palm (cream)

  - Maple (pale pink-ish brown)
  
  - Beech (pale orange)
  
  - Pine (dark brown)
  
  - Cedar (yellow-y brown)
  
  - Ghostwood (light grey)

  - Scorchwood (black)
  
  - Green Jungle (dark green)
  
  - Green Bamboo (using Vanilla's Block of Bamboo)
- Coconuts
  
  - These act as the Saplings for Palm Trees but can also be used to craft brown Coconut Thatch blocks, which also have Stairs and Slab variants

- Two additional new trees
  
  - Gold Acacia, with gold leaves

  - Yellow Birch, with bright yellow leaves
- The Autumnal Forest biome (where Maple, Beech, and Yellow Birch can be found)
- The Scorched Forest biome (where Scorchwood is found)
- The Alpine Forest biome (where Pine and Cedar are found)
- Fallen Leaves (Carpet-like blocks for all leaf types)
- Hedges (Wall-like blocks for all leaf types)
- Bookshelves for every wood type
- Scorched Grass (a darker grass block than Mycelium or Podzol)
- Ashen Carpet (a sooty black carpet block)
- Grimstone (a pale red/purple stone block)
  
  - Grimstone (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Polished Grimstone (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Grimstone Bricks (Block, Cracked variant, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Grimstone Tiles (Block, Cracked variant, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Chiseled Grimstone
- Light Tuff (Pale green/grey variant of Tuff)

  - Light Tuff (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Polished Light Tuff (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Light Tuff Bricks (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Chiseled Light Tuff and Light Tuff Bricks
- Antigorite (a pale green stone block equivalent to Granite, Diorite, and Andesite)
  
  - Anitgorite (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Polished Antigorite (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Antigorite Bricks (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)
- Polished Granite, Diorite, and Andesite Walls
- Granite, Diorite, and Andesite Bricks (Blocks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls)
- Calcite Blocks:
  
  - Calcite made craftable with Cobblestone and Bone Meal

  - Calcite stairs, slabs, and walls

  - Polished Calcite (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Calcite Bricks (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)
- More Bamboo Blocks
  
  - Bamboo Thatch
  
  - Bamboo Thatch Stairs
  
  - Bamboo Thatch Slab
  
  - Bamboo Thatch Rug
  
  - Bamboo Mosaic Rug
  
- Hay Slabs and Stairs
- Smooth Stone Stairs
- Sandstone and Red Sandstone Bricks (with Cracked, Stairs, Slab and Wall variants for each)
- Cut Sandstone and Red Sandstone Stairs and Walls
- Smooth Sandstone and Red Sandstone Walls
- Dark Sand:
  
  - Dark Sand
  
  - Dark Sandstone (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)
  
  - Smooth Dark Sandstone (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Cut Dark Sandstone

  - Dark Sandstone Bricks (Block, Stairs, Slab, and Wall)

  - Chiseled Dark Sandstone
- Nether Blocks:
  
  - A full set of Black Nether Brick blocks
  
  - Chiseled and Cracked variants as well as Fences and Fence Gates for Red Nether Bricks
  
  - Fence Gate for regular Nether Bricks
  
  - Quartz Wall
  
  - Smooth Quartz Wall
  
  - Quartz Brick Wall
  
  - Quartz Brick Stairs
  
  - Quartz Brick Slabs

- Makes Pumpkin Pies placeable
- Numerous Advancements
- More to come!
------------------------
### Add-Ons:
- If you're used to bushier leaves (like the ones in the featured image in the gallery), or would like to try them, you can find a texture pack that will make all Vanilla and BFB leaves bushier [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/leaves-for-bfb).
- If (like I was) you were used to Vanilla Tweaks' retexturing of the Nether Woods, you can find a texture pack to make BFB's bookshelves fit with them [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nether-woods-for-bfb).
- If (like I am) you're used to Vanilla Tweaks' crafting tweaks, you can find a datapack doing the equivalent for BFB recipes [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/crafting-tweaks-for-bfb).
- Older versions of BFB had a Paper Lantern, which was removed as of v3.1.0. If you want it back, you can find it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/bfb-paper-lanterns).
- If you were fond of the original Ghostwood textures, or simply prefer them to Pale Oak, you can find a pack to change Pale Oak plank textures to Ghostwood [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ghostwood-pale-oak-planks).

_Shaders used in gallery images are [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/latest)._

------------------------
### Compatibilities:
- ModernFix (and specifically its optional Dynamic Resource functionality) is currently known to cause issues in other mods, including Blocks for Builders, when installed server-side, so if you want to run BFB, make sure you're not running ModernFix on a server.

------------------------
### Credits:
- Initial Black Nether Brick and Green Jungle Wood Textures - Vanilla Tweaks (https://vanillatweaks.net/)
